calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-14-2003 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as assigned from the Presiding Judge Master Calendar for Court Trial.
Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ann Mendoza.
J. Michael Phelps, Esq., for Plaintiff: Andrea Lucchesi.
Shannon Eagan, Esq., for Defendant: Allesandra Ortiz.
No appearance by Defendant: Benjamin Ortiz.
09:35 am. - Plaintiff's witness, Andrea Lucchesi was sworn and direct examined by counsel.
PLTF EXH #1 - Lease agreement --------------- ID/EVID.
PLTF EXH #2 - Three day notice --------------- ID/EVID.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendant Benjamin Ortiz (only), for restitution and possession of the premises at: 58 Latona Street, San Francisco. Plaintiff and Defendant, Allesandra Ortiz settled and to vacate the premises by 8-31-03. At plaintiff's request, No judgment filed or entered unless defendants fails to vacate as agreed.
Rental agreement declared forfeited.
Counsel stipulated for return of exhibits.
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-14-2003 Assigned To Trial Court

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-07-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT BENJAMIN ORTIZ, ORTIZ, ALEJANDRINA DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OFF CALENDER
FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED 6/12. JUDGE: DAVID A. GARCIA, Joseph Vickstein, CSR 4780, (DAG/301)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-03-2003 Continued To Jul-14-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Continuance
Off Calendar May-10-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Donna J. Hitchens, Clerk Nicole Adams, Reporter Beldon Yee.

Motion to continue trial granted, trial continued to Jul-14-2003. Parties will maintain Jul-03-2003 settlement conference. Parties will meet and confer regarding the taking of one deposition, plaintiff will hand served one set of interrogatories by today, Jul-03-2003.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-03-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for settlement conference this day.
Judge Herbert Donaldson, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Valejo, CSR. Lavon Granger.
John Phelps, Esq., for Plaintiff Andrea Lucchesi.
Shannon Eagan, Eaq. for Defendant Allesandra Ortiz also present with Spanish Interpreter, Yulissa Zulaica.
Parties not settled. Trial date confirmed 7-14-03.
